case_title: CATANIA GALVAN VS. ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALVAN, CATANIA AS TO DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY FASHION INSTITUTE DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-10-2015

ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT TO JUL-15-2015; EX PARTE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-02-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15228064)
